testcase.name: Dashboard (Authenticated) › should load the dashboard components
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › dashboard.spec.ts:31:7 › Dashboard (Authenticated) › should load the dashboard components
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('input[name="username"]') Expected: visible Timeout: 10000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for locator('input[name="username"]')
14 | 15 | // If TEST_MODE is working, this form will be visible > 16 | await expect(usernameInput).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10000 }); | ^ 17 | 18 | // 3. Login 19 | await usernameInput.fill('testuser'); at /Users/racoon/Documents/antigravity/wise-curie/tests/e2e/dashboard.spec.ts:16:33
